name: v05-protected
description: v0.5 middleware demo — a protected endpoint guarded by two trigger-level middleware: `auth-check` (rejects requests without a matching bearer token) then `rate-limit` (5 requests per 60s window per identity). Middleware run in declared order and share the same ctx; auth-check stashes `ctx.state.identity.token` so rate-limit's per-user bucket key is keyed on the authenticated user. The main step just echoes back `{ ok: true, identity, ts }` once both middleware pass.

inputs.expression: ({ ok: true, identity: ctx.state.identity, ts: Date.now() })
